text: Interrupt: When you declare a conflict, choose a number greater than 0 and bow this stronghold – your opponent declares defenders for this conflict. Then declare the conflict (choosing attackers, ring, conflict type, and province). You must declare a number of attackers equal to the number you chose.
name: Seven Stings Keep

text: Eminent. (This province starts the game faceup and cannot be turned facedown. It cannot be a stronghold province.) Each character played from this province costs 2 less to play and enters play dishonored.
name: Shinsei's Last Hope

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, discard the top 4 cards of your dynasty deck. Choose a character in your dynasty discard pile - put that character into play. If it is in play at the end of the phase, put it on the bottom of your dynasty deck.
name: Spectral Visitation

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed - each player discards each character they control with no fate, reveals cards from the top of their dynasty deck until an equal number of characters are revealed, and puts those characters into play. Shuffle.
name: Retire to the Brotherhood

text:
Eminent.
During conflicts, you may play each character in this province as if it were in your hand. Each character played this way must enter play in the conflict.
name: Wind's Path

text: Action: During a conflict at an [element-air] province, choose a participating character - that character gets +2[conflict-military] and +2[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict.
name: Driven By Courage

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) While this character is attacking, characters with less [conflict-military] skill than the number of unbroken provinces you control cannot be declared as defenders. Errata from RRG v15 (2020-10-05)
name: Butcher of the Fallen

text: Rally. Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel against a character your opponent controls of their choice - resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's winner may trigger the attacked province's action ability as if they controlled the province, even if it has already been triggered this round (or specified period).
name: Cunning Negotiator

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Reaction: After the conflict phase begins - reveal this holding's province.
name: Daidoji Marketplace

text: Interrupt: When this character leaves play, choose an unbroken province you control – turn that province facedown.
flavorText: "In another lifetime, her untrod path shall be a road." – Togashi Mitsu
name: Traveling Philosopher

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if there is a Battlefield in play - gain 1 honor.
flavorText: "I have seen the flames of war rage across the plain, consuming palace and city and monastery alike. It is a sight I will never forget."
name: Chronicler of Conquests

text: Reaction: After the fate phase begins, bow this character and choose an attachment – shuffle that attachment into its owner's conflict deck. That player draws 1 card.
flavorText: "What need have we for weapons and armor when we have the Kami at our side?"
name: Inspired Visionary

text: Pride. Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, lose 1 honor - your opponent discards 1 random card from their hand.
flavorText: "The Kami only know how many cells these Thunder Guard fill, how many bodies they leave behind..." - Crime Lord Ikku
name: Thunder Guard Elite

text: Action: Choose a character with no fate - discard that character.
flavorText: "Your loyalty has been recognized, and you may take up your new assignment in Kinbō Province at once." – Soshi Shiori
name: Dispatch to Nowhere

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Reaction: After this character moves to a conflict, choose a character – ready that character.
name: Twilight Rider

text: Reaction: After a character you control moves to a conflict - it gets +2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. (Limit twice per round.)
name: Moto Stables

text: Interrupt: When this character leaves play, choose an attachment – discard it.
flavorText: "If we do not let go our fear and our desire, we will be trapped in this cycle for eternity."
name: Disciple of Shinsei

text: Void role only. Action: Lose 1 honor - discard a status token from attached character. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: "Did this power not also come from the heavens?"
name: Obsidian Talisman

text: Fire role only. Interrupt: When the effects of a province's triggered ability would initiate – cancel those effects.
flavorText: "Do not make the mistake of inviting a master artisan into your home." - Kitsuki Chiari
name: Highlight the Flaws

text: Void role only. Action: During a conflict - cancel all ring effects until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: None knew what had brought them together, yet is was agreed that none could find their answers alone.
name: Mountaintop Vigil

text: Action: Choose a card in or attached to a province - move that card to another unbroken non-stronghold province controlled by the same player. If there is a Battlefield in play, draw 1 card.
name: Logistics

text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, choose a broken province that shares an element with a ring in your claimed ring pool - restore that province. Remove this card from the game.
name: Ethereal Alignment

text: Earth role only. Action: During the conflict phase, sacrifice a bowed (friendly) Bushi, Courtier, or Shugenja character - you may declare an additional [conflict-political] conflict this phase. (Max 1 per phase.)
name: Suffer the Consequences

text: Reaction: After you declare an attack - until the end of the conflict, each character you control cannot be bowed or moved home by opponents' card effects.
name: Never Yield
